channel.title: Snow Software — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Snow Software (snow).

item.title: CVE-2024-4129 · 8.8 HIGH — Authentication bypass in Snow License Manager
item.description: Improper Authentication vulnerability in Snow Software AB Snow License Manager on Windows allows a networked attacker to perform an Authentication Bypass if Active Directory Authentication is enabled.This issue affects Snow License Manager: from 9.33…

item.title: CVE-2024-1150 · 7.8 HIGH — Improper validation of update packages
item.description: Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature vulnerability in Snow Software Inventory Agent on Unix allows File Manipulation through Snow Update Packages.This issue affects Inventory Agent: through 7.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-1149 · 7.8 HIGH — Improper validation of update packages
item.description: Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature vulnerability in Snow Software Inventory Agent on MacOS, Snow Software Inventory Agent on Windows, Snow Software Inventory Agent on Linux allows File Manipulation through Snow Update Packages.This issu…

item.title: CVE-2023-7169 · 6 MEDIUM — Impersonate vendor signed Powershell scripts
item.description: Authentication Bypass by Spoofing vulnerability in Snow Software Snow Inventory Agent on Windows allows Signature Spoof.This issue affects Snow Inventory Agent: through 6.14.5. Customers advised to upgrade to version 7.0

item.title: CVE-2023-3937 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Cross site scripting vulnerabilities in Snow License Manager
item.description: Cross site scripting vulnerability in web portal in Snow Software License Manager from version 9.0.0 up to and including 9.30.1 on Windows allows an authenticated user with high privileges to trigger cross site scripting attack via the web browser

item.title: CVE-2023-3864 · 7.2 HIGH — SQL injection vulnerability in Snow License Manager
item.description: Blind SQL injection in a service running in Snow Software license manager from version 8.0.0 up to and including 9.30.1 on Windows allows a logged in user with high privileges to inject SQL commands via the web portal.

item.title: CVE-2023-2679 · 4.1 MEDIUM — Data leakage in Adobe connector for SPE edition of SLM
item.description: Data leakage in Adobe connector in Snow Software SPE 9.27.0 on Windows allows privileged user to observe other users data.

item.title: CVE-2022-0883 · 7.3 HIGH — Windows Unquoted/Trusted Service Paths
item.description: SLM has an issue with Windows Unquoted/Trusted Service Paths Security Issue. All installations version 9.x.x prior to 9.20.1 should be patched.

item.title: CVE-2021-4106 · 7.8 HIGH — Vulnerability in Snow Inventory Java Scanner
item.description: A vulnerability in Snow Inventory Java Scanner allows an attacker to run malicious code at a higher level of privileges. This issue affects: SNOW Snow Inventory Java Scanner 1.0

item.title: CVE-2021-41562 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Deletion of arbitrary files vulnerability in Snow Agent for Windows
item.description: A vulnerability in Snow Snow Agent for Windows allows a non-admin user to cause arbitrary deletion of files. This issue affects: Snow Snow Agent for Windows version 5.0.0 to 6.7.1 on Windows.
